items.title: 人工智能热潮寻找资金进入债券市场新领域 - 华尔街日报
items.summary:
渴望资金的人工智能公司纷纷涌入债券市场的一个神秘角落。

美国公司为了资助他们的人工智能抱负，正在发行接近创纪录数量的债券，如果股价涨到指定价格，投资者可以将这些债券转换为股票。投资者喜欢这种相对稳定
items.content:
人工智能公司急需资金，纷纷涌入债券市场的一个隐秘角落。

美国公司为了资助他们的人工智能雄心，正在发行接近创纪录数量的债券，如果股价升至指定价格，投资者可以将这些债券转换为股票。投资者喜欢这种既能获得债券相对稳定性，又能在股价上涨时获得部分收益的投资方式。

items.title: Anthropic 将人工智能设计和编码结合在 Claude 中 - CNET
items.summary: 这场混乱是美国政府与人工智能开发者之间日益增长的冲突的最新篇章。Anthropic公开拒绝让国防部在涉及监控和全自主武器的某些情况下使用Claude。作为Anthropic最大的竞争对手之一，Open
items.content:
这场混乱是美国政府与人工智能开发者之间日益加剧的冲突的最新篇章。Anthropic公司公开拒绝让国防部在涉及监控和完全自主武器的某些情况下使用Claude。作为Anthropic的主要竞争对手之一，OpenAI迅速填补了这一空缺，获得了五角大楼的合同。但关于人工智能在军事行动中角色的问题仍然大多未得到解答。

本周，Anthropic还被一群Claude用户起诉，他们指控公司对其付费计划的使用限制进行了虚假宣传。

KATELYN CHEDRAOUI
记者

items.title: ChatGPT's user share falls below 50% for the first time, with Gemini and Claude catching up. - GIGAZINE
items.summary: According to True Audience share tracked by Sensor Tower, ChatGPT fell below 50% for the first time
items.content:
According to True Audience share tracked by Sensor Tower, ChatGPT fell below 50% for the first time in March 2026, reaching 46.4% at the end of May. Gemini expanded to 27.7%, and Claude to 10.3%. [...] ChatGPT's market share slips below 50% for first time | TechCrunch  
   
  
 Sensor Tower State of AI 2026 Report: Global Time Spent on Generative AI Apps Projected to More Than Double Year-Over-Year  
   
  
 Claude beats ChatGPT on revenue per user, report finds  
   
  
 Since OpenAI released ChatGPT in November 2022, it has rapidly gained popularity as a leading entry point for using generative AI. However, as the market expands, more users are choosing AI based on factors such as integration with existing services, areas of expertise, pricing, and processing speed, creating ample room for competitors to acquire users. [...] While OpenAI has the most users, Claude surpasses ChatGPT in revenue per user for mobile apps in the United States. According to The Next Web, in May 2026, Claude's revenue per user was $2.76 (approximately 443 yen), while ChatGPT's was $1.74 (approximately 279 yen).  
  
 While OpenAI has a significant lead in terms of user numbers, Anthropic holds a considerable advantage in terms of profitability, and it has been revealed that its annualized revenue will surpass OpenAI's by March 2026.  
  
 AI demand explodes, but computing power becomes a constraint; OpenAI, which had made massive investments, is aiming for a comeback - GIGAZINE

items.title: 首次报道，ChatGPT 在人工智能助手市场的份额首次低于一半 - Gizmodo
items.summary: In short, ChatGPT’s loss of dominance arrived during a less-than-ideal year for its brand image—alth
items.content:
简而言之，ChatGPT的失势发生在对其品牌形象不太理想的一年中——尽管在“加分”项上，OpenAI赢得了与埃隆·马斯克的法律战，所以它的一年并非完全没有亮点。

根据这份报告，Anthropic的Claude市场份额为10.3%——远不及Gemini的27.7%，更不用说ChatGPT的46.4%。然而，路透社对Sensor Tower报告的早期分析表明，Claude的年对年月活跃用户增长率远远超过了OpenAI，Claude为640%，而ChatGPT仅为62%。

items.title: 《连锁店时代》将在六月节关闭 — 《连锁店时代》
items.summary: + AI online traffic converted 54% better than non-AI sources, a sharp reversal from 2025 when conver
items.content:
+ AI online traffic converted 54% better than non-AI sources, a sharp reversal from 2025 when conversion rates were nearly half as high. Eight in 10 consumers who use AI for shopping surveyed by Adobe say they use it more than they used to, and 79% feel more confident in purchases made with AI assistance.
  + Once on site, AI-referred shoppers are 15% more engaged, the strongest advantage recorded since Adobe began tracking AI online traffic in October 2024. These shoppers also spend more time on the website (53% longer per visit), browse more pages (23% more pages per visit, nearly double March 2026 levels), and are significantly less likely to leave immediately (-36% bounce rate, a record low). [...] + AI visits are now worth 53% morethan non-AI visits,another record high (up from 37% in March 2026). This marks a turnaround from May 2025, when non-AI visits were worth 128% more than AI visits. [...] Nordstrom Inc. operates nearly 400 Nordstrom, Nordstrom Local and Nordstrom Rack locations nationwide.
 6/16/2026

  ## Amazon to invest billions in Missouri data center campus

  Amazon is developing state-of-the-art artificial intelligence and cloud infrastructure in Missouri.

  The online giant will dedicate “several billion” dollars to build a data center campus in Montgomery County, Mo. The project will support cloud computing technologies and in addition, Amazon says it will create new jobs, enable road and water infrastructure improvements, generate hundreds of millions of dollars in new tax revenue and support community education programs.

items.title: 当一切皆为健康时，品牌如何竞争？- 美容独立
items.summary: Mintz将TikTok Shop描述为“一个很好的试验渠道”，但指出在该平台上的重复购买行为往往比直接面向消费者网站或亚马逊要弱。他强调品牌应该考虑他们的核心客户是否真的在该平台上购物，并在营销中小
items.content:
Mintz 将 TikTok Shop 描述为“一个极好的试水渠道”，但指出重复购买行为往往比在直接面向消费者的网站或亚马逊上要弱。他强调品牌应该考虑他们的核心客户是否真的在该平台上购物，并对他们在营销中所做出的声明保持谨慎。提到声明时，他说：“这将在退出时受到大量审查。”

Natale 强调品牌不能简单地设置 TikTok Shop 然后置之不理，他们必须保持高度投入并密切管理这种关系，以利用平台的激励和支持。

展望未来，Whittel 预测 TikTok 在商业中的角色将会演变，举例说明韩国品牌使用人工智能驱动的直播主持人全天候销售产品。[...] 验证，TikTok Shop 所呈现的机会和风险，以及产品创新在推动消费者采纳方面的作用。[...]

### TikTok Shop 的平衡之举

健康是 TikTok Shop 的顶级类别之一，OMI 计划在未来三到四个月内在该平台上推出，但小组成员警告说，这对品牌来说可能是一把双刃剑。根据 Natale 的说法，Love Wellness 已经在 TikTok Shop 上销售产品两年，并通过该渠道每年创造数百万美元的收入。尽管如此，她还是警告品牌要意识到风险。

她说：“如果 TikTok 明天消失了，然后我不得不将其从我的损益表中抹去，我无法完成我的年度目标怎么办？”“因此，这些类型的平台存在风险和回报。”

items.title: Why Omnichannel Breaks at Scale and How Orchestration Fixes It - Retail TouchPoints
items.summary:
## 店面看起来不错，后端却不行。

Kouretas 和 Hachem 一开始就做出了诊断：大多数企业商务体验的前端并不是出错的地方。

“通常是它背后的一切，”Hachem 说。“不同的履行规则，
items.content:
## The Storefront Looks Fine. The Back End Doesn’t.

Kouretas and Hachem opened with a diagnosis: the front end of most enterprise commerce experiences is not where things go wrong.

“It’s usually everything that’s behind it,” Hachem said. “Different fulfillment rules, different inventory views for each channel, nothing actually unifying them properly. The exact same order can behave completely differently depending on where it came from.”

He described a client situation that illustrated the problem. A global apparel brand selling across DTC and multiple marketplaces had strong traffic and healthy demand numbers but couldn’t explain a persistent pattern of cancellations and refunds, especially around peak periods. [...] For retail brands experiencing rapid growth, success itself can become the problem. The more channels a brand activates, including DTC websites, marketplaces, social commerce and emerging AI-powered surfaces, the more likely execution is to quietly break behind a perfectly functional storefront.

That was the central argument made by Frank Kouretas, Chief Product Officer at ESW, and Serge Hachem, who oversees solutions engineering and technical architecture at Lazer Technologies, Shopify’s enterprise implementation partner, during a June 2026 Retail TouchPoints webinar titled “Fragmented Commerce: Where Enterprise Growth Breaks Down.”

## The Storefront Looks Fine. The Back End Doesn’t. [...] The root cause: each channel was reading inventory from a different source on a different refresh schedule. Units would sell simultaneously on a marketplace and the DTC site, and an order would quietly cancel a day later due to stockout, with the team only learning about it through refund queues and support tickets, never in real time.

“What we had to do was give them a shared view of inventory and write every order against that single source of truth,” Hachem said. “That essentially fixed it for them.”

## Discovery Has Fragmented, But Trust Hasn’t Followed

### 机器人技术融资创纪录，物理
items.content:
2026年第一季度

# 机器人技术与物理人工智能风险投资趋势

PitchBook客户可以通过PitchBook平台上的研究中心访问完整报告和Excel数据包。

### 机器人技术融资创纪录，物理人工智能迈向部署

2026年第一季度，机器人技术与物理人工智能创下了史上最强劲的季度记录。初创企业通过492笔交易筹集了163亿美元，其中Shield AI、Saronic和Neura Robotics的大型交易，以及投资者对行业定价方式的更广泛重置，共同推动了这一增长。资金激增是表面故事，更深层次的是机器人技术正从实验阶段转向部署阶段，国防采购市场、商业机器人即服务合同以及首批有意义的退出浪潮都在同一季度出现。[...] 该季度还提高了尽职调查的标准。投资者不再根据技术是否有效来判断机器人公司，而是判断公司是否能够大规模生产、赢得付费客户以及降低集成成本。这种转变使得资本流向工业机器人、国防自主性和机器人软件平台。这也给仍然依赖演示、研究买家和未经证实的商业化路径的仿人公司提出了更严峻的问题。

2026年第一季度，机器人技术与物理人工智能风险投资活动激增至创纪录的163亿美元，涉及492笔交易，由Shield AI、Saronic和Neura Robotics的大型交易推动。

目录 [...] ### 基础设施SaaS风险投资趋势

2026年第一季度基础设施SaaS风险投资趋势报告分析了近期的风险投资活动，并包括了该领域领先的风险投资支持公司的市场地图。

### Anthropic：预计定价人工智能的S-1

这份分析师报告审查了Anthropic的S-1文件，作为首个启动IPO流程的前沿人工智能实验室，识别了将决定其估值是否保持的关键财务披露。

这笔资金将用于进一步开发和扩展公司的数据分析工具及其核心验证框架系统，该系统通过减少模型歧义确保高准确性的AI响应。

由Peter Elias创立的Probably是一家致力于创建能够像确定性软件一样可靠运行的高精度AI系统的人工智能初创公司。其首个产品是一款数据分析工具，能够从复杂数据集中快速提供准确答案，并提供完整的引用和审计追踪。

items.title: PE climbs. VC slides. Europe’s capital markets rebalance - delano.lu
items.summary: Pitchbook在其最新的2026年6月报告《预测欧洲私募资本管理资产规模》中分析了欧洲私募资本管理资产（AUM）到2030年的可能演变情况，重点关注风险投资（VC）和私募股权（PE）。核心结论是，
items.content:
Pitchbook在其最新的2026年6月报告《预测欧洲私募资本管理资产（AUM）》中分析了2030年之前欧洲私募资本管理资产（AUM）的可能演变情况，重点关注风险投资（VC）和私募股权（PE）。核心结论是，这两类资产正在分化：预计欧洲PE将继续稳步增长，而欧洲VC由于筹资挑战和流动性条件疲软，将面临长期的停滞或下降。

## 风险投资：十年增长逆转 [...] 2026年6月17日，星期三

如果成功的退出案例出现，人工智能（AI）可能成为主要催化剂，但欧洲大部分仍处于资本部署阶段，与美国不同，美国领先的AI公司已接近公开市场，Pitchbook在其2026年6月发布的《预测欧洲私募资本管理资产（AUM）》报告中解释道。图片：Shutterstock

欧洲风险投资的黄金时代可能暂时结束了。Pitchbook预测，到2030年，欧洲VC管理资产将大幅下降，而私募股权继续吸引投资者，并巩固其作为欧洲大陆主导的私募市场策略的地位。[...]

## 风险投资：十年增长逆转

Pitchbook预测，从2025年的4314亿美元下降到2030年的3110亿美元，欧洲VC管理资产将出现显著逆转，与过去十年观察到的强劲增长形成对比。主要原因是筹资活动疲软。自2022年达到峰值以来，筹集的资本和VC基金数量每年都在下降，限制了新资本流入生态系统。

风险投资管理资产预测（以十亿美元计） 来源：Pitchbook
• 地理：欧洲

items.title: Breaking through the SaaS ‘sea of sameness’ - The Drum
items.summary:
(Mink Mingle/Unsplash)

Software as a service (SaaS) marketing has a sameness problem. And the uncom
items.content:
(Mink Mingle/Unsplash)

Software as a service (SaaS) marketing has a sameness problem. And the uncomfortable truth is that most marketing teams are aware of it. They just don’t know how to get out of it without feeling like they are taking a massive risk.

For years, SaaS marketing has been built around scale. More features, more campaigns, more content and more channels. Growth often came from moving faster and producing more than competitors.

But the SaaS market has become increasingly saturated, with more than 58,000 SaaS companies competing in categories where products, messaging and positioning look like carbon copies of one another. [...] Strong SaaS positioning helps buyers quickly understand who a product is for, where it delivers value and why it’s different from alternatives. Weak positioning does the opposite. It creates friction, slows decision-making and makes products easier to dismiss during procurement scrutiny.

And this is exactly why distinctiveness is now more commercially important than ever.

In crowded categories, growth will depend on memorability rather than volume alone. Marketing effectiveness won’t come purely from precision targeting or higher output. It will result from being remembered.

Advertisement

## The SaaS brands buyers will remember [...] At the same time, AI has dramatically accelerated content production, making it easier than ever for brands to publish thought leadership, launch campaigns and maintain constant visibility.

The result is a growing ‘sea of sameness,’ where SaaS brands struggle to remain memorable and buyers are overwhelmed by near-identical messaging.

Advertisement

## Differentiation matters more now than ever

The ‘more, more, more’ approach might not have mattered during the era of aggressive SaaS growth, when budgets were expanding and buyers were more willing to experiment.

items.title: 红杉资本的露西亚娜·利克桑德鲁：欧洲能否打造一家千亿美元科技公司？- 金融时报
items.summary: TB: A lot of the AI start-ups in London, and the big US companies opening offices here, are in King’
items.content:
TB: A lot of the AI start-ups in London, and the big US companies opening offices here, are in King’s Cross, where Google DeepMind has been based for a long time and is about to open a new office. What is it about AI that means people want to be in the same physical place?

LL: I think because things are moving so fast, they want to learn from each other, and they want to understand early on where the world is going. I was talking to one of my founders and he mentioned that now they reiterate their product roadmap every single month. Honestly, I didn’t hear that five years ago, in the SaaS era. It’s just everything is moving so, so quickly. I think it’s very helpful for people to learn from one another and be very, very nimble. [...] Accessibility help

items.content:
With Goldman Sachs projecting a potential record $160 billion in U.S. IPO proceeds in 2026, including high-profile listings from SpaceX and Anthropic, institutional attention is increasingly concentrated in equity markets, leaving many crypto-native traders without direct access to the assets driving today's biggest returns.

Zoomex Stocks bridges that gap.

Available now under the Spot – Tokenized Stocks section of the Zoomex platform, the product offers tokenized versions of twelve major U.S. equities and ETFs, including TSLAx, NVDAx, AAPLx, AMZNx, METAx, GOOGLx, COINx, HOODx, MSTRx, CRCLx, QQQx, and SPYx.

Source: Zoomex [...] My Markets Watchlist

Markets   News

# As Capital Rotates From Crypto to AI, Zoomex Traders Already Have Access to Both

PRESS RELEASE GlobeNewswire

Jun. 17, 2026, 03:42 AM

VICTORIA, Seychelles, June 17, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- As institutional capital continues its notable shift from cryptocurrency markets toward artificial intelligence and semiconductor stocks, Zoomex, a global crypto derivatives exchange, announces the availability of Zoomex Stocks, a tokenized equities trading solution designed to give users seamless access to both asset classes from a single account. [...] The timing reflects a significant structural change in global markets. U.S. spot Bitcoin ETFs recorded approximately $2.7 billion in outflows in just one week ending June 5, 2026, pushing year-to-date net outflows past $3.1 billion. Over the same period, AI and semiconductor stocks surged roughly 170%, while the AI UBS Winners Index climbed nearly 50% in 2026 alone, compared to just 3.5% for the broader S&P 500 excluding AI names. A single trading session in early June illustrated this divergence sharply, with the Philadelphia Semiconductor Index rising approximately 5.9% as Bitcoin declined around 4%.

items.title: Brazil EV Sales Report: 153% Growth in May Brings Latin America’s Largest Market to 13.5% EV Market Share! - CleanTechnica
items.summary:
Let’s look at the numbers!

## Market Overview

Brazil’s market is highly seasonal, with vehicle sal
items.content:
Let’s look at the numbers!

## Market Overview

Brazil’s market is highly seasonal, with vehicle sales normally peaking at the end of the year and then going down, significantly, in January. EV sales follow the same pattern, meaning normally it takes a while to reach December sales in the following year: for example, in 2024 and 2025, it wasn’t until July that the record from the prior December was surpassed.

But 2026 is proving different. Already in March we saw EV sales reach the levels from December 2025, and by May, these have grown nearly 40% compared with that prior record, something that in previous years only happened an entire 12 months after the prior record. [...] Latin America’s giant is waking up.

For long a regional leader (ranking consistently in the fourth position in our region), Brazil has shown long periods of relative stagnation followed by sudden bursts of growth triggered by the entrance of new, more competitive models in the country. However, this trend (constant for as long as the market provided data) seems to be breaking apart: since December 2025, we’ve seen high year-on-year as well as month-on-month growth, with a constant stream of records that has brought the market all the way up to 13.5% EV market share (7.7% BEV) in May 2026. [...] Thanks to this, Brazil’s EV sales have reached an all-time high of almost 37,000 units, a gargantuan amount that, if my calculations are correct, would make Brazil the sixth or seventh largest EV market in the world, after China, the US, Germany, France, and the UK (and perhaps South Korea), quite the accomplishment if we take into account that in 2025 the country did not even make it into the top 10.

Even though PHEVs remain extremely popular, Brazil has been slowly pivoting towards purely electric vehicles: through 2025, BEVs accounted for only 45% of the EV market, whereas in May 2026 that amount has increased to 57%, and even through all of 2026 BEVs are now dominant, representing 54.5% of all EV s

 Partner Content [...] In a statement, Jon Poelma, Managing Director, APM Terminals Los Angeles, said: “This procurement is grounded in 12 months of real-world performance data. Our operators ran these trucks hard, and the results earned this expansion.”

With all 60 units expected in service by January 2027, Pier 400 will have converted around 60% of its terminal tractor fleet to battery-electric, the highest conversion rate among container terminals at the Port of Los Angeles. Ahead of delivery, lead International Longshore and Warehouse Union mechanics will complete Level 2 electrical safety training.

items.title: 100 Battery Energy Storage Systems To Be Installed At Commercial Sites - CleanTechnica
items.summary: Battery storage plays a critical role in that transition. It allows businesses to reduce costs, bett
items.content:
Battery storage plays a critical role in that transition. It allows businesses to reduce costs, better manage peak demand, and make smarter use of the energy they consume. By combining energy efficiency, onsite generation, storage, and ongoing energy management into a single platform, we’re making those benefits more accessible to commercial customers.

That’s why we’re expanding now; we see a significant opportunity to accelerate adoption of demand-side energy infrastructure across the commercial market.

 Sign up for CleanTechnica's Weekly Substack for Zach and Scott's in-depth analyses and high level summaries, sign up for our daily newsletter, and follow us on Google News! 

 Advertisement [...] Skip to content

Image Credit: Viridi 

# 100 Battery Energy Storage Systems To Be Installed At Commercial Sites

5 seconds   Jake Richardson     0 Comments

 Support CleanTechnica's work through a Substack subscription or on Stripe. 

The energy-as-a-service company Budderfly has partnered with Viridi to add battery energy storage systems at some of the commercial sites it manages. Budderfly provides energy-efficient equipment, measuring and billing technology, virtual power plants, smart technology monitoring, and more. Typically, battery energy storage systems are installed in smaller numbers, so it is both remarkable and intriguing to hear about such a large initiative. [...] Jon M. Williams, Viridi CEO, and Tom Flynn, Chief Administrative Officer and General Counsel at Budderfly, answered some questions about the partnership for CleanTechnica.

How many battery energy storage systems will be installed and where?

The first phase of the partnership will deploy battery energy storage systems across approximately 100 Budderfly-managed commercial sites nationwide, beginning with early deployments in Massachusetts, Connecticut, and California.

items.title: Jackery FridgeGuard Takes Stylish, Customer-Centric Design to Refrigerator Backup Battery - CleanTechnica
items.summary: 主要电器的即用即充电存储可能扮演着重要的角色。虽然它不能取代全屋存储的所有功能，但它扩展了能源存储能力，并在最需要的地方提供备用电源。即使全屋电池耗尽，冰箱也可以继续运行。它还可以有效地扩展存储，在需
items.content:
大型家电的点用电池存储可能扮演着重要的角色。虽然它不能取代全屋存储的所有功能，但它扩展了能源存储能力，并在最需要的地方提供备用电源。即使全屋电池耗尽，冰箱也可以继续运行。它还可以有效地扩展需要更多电池容量的应用中的存储，以利用屋顶太阳能或时段用电计划。对于计划使用电动汽车进行V2L电池备份的人来说，他们可以在停电期间进行短途旅行，而不会让关键电器断电。[...] 这个价格点明显低于特斯拉Powerwall或GM能源存储捆绑包的每千瓦时价格。而且它不需要电工来安装，这在一些家庭中可能成本很高，在许多公寓中根本无法实现。成本和实施的便捷性有助于推动整体家庭电池和能源存储技术的采用。

### 为客户需求设计的清洁技术 [...] ### 为客户需求设计的清洁技术

随着电费的上涨、通货膨胀、与气候变化相关的极端天气增加以及电网不稳定的潜在风险，许多人正在寻找新的方法来管理他们的能源使用，变得更加自给自足。能源存储在管理能源、增加可再生能源利用、减少排放以及可能为拥有太阳能板或时段用电计划的人降低成本方面发挥着重要作用。但是能源存储有多种角色。按每千瓦时计算，公用事业规模的储能系统是有效的，但它对于离网应用、电力中断或通过转移电力使用来降低家庭公用事业账单几乎没有帮助。人们仍然依赖公用事业来有效实施它。

items.title: 电池峰会2026：基山·雷迪概述自力更生和全球竞争力电池产业战略 - 能源印度杂志
items.summary:
在活动期间，世界资源研究所（WRI）印度分部与印度理工学院（IIT）鲁尔基分校签署了谅解备忘录，以合作推动电池创新、研究和知识共享计划。

峰会还展示了超过20家初创公司的技术，这些公司正在研究先进的
items.content:
在活动期间，世界资源研究所（WRI）印度分部与印度理工学院（IIT）鲁尔基分校签署了一份谅解备忘录，以合作推动电池创新、研究和知识共享计划。

峰会还展示了超过20家初创公司的技术，这些公司正在研究先进的电池化学、能源储存系统、电池管理技术和回收解决方案，同时发布了关于电池可追溯性、数据管理框架以及支持本土电动汽车和电池制造政策的报告。[...]“在尊敬的总理纳伦德拉·莫迪（Narendra Modi）的远见卓识领导下，印度已经采取了一系列大胆和前瞻性的决策，以确保我们的清洁能源未来。这一旅程的下一阶段需要一个有韧性的电池生态系统，这取决于印度如何有效地确保关键矿物的供应并加强其国内制造能力。前瞻性政策驱动的战略伙伴关系和投资对于释放这一转型的真正潜力至关重要。”

印度寻求减少对进口电池材料和技术的依赖，因为能源储存和电动出行的需求加速增长。[...]印度需要加强国内电池制造并确保关键矿物供应，以支持其清洁能源转型和长期经济增长，煤炭和矿业联盟部长G. Kishan Reddy表示。

Reddy在新德里举行的2026年电池峰会上表示，电池将在帮助印度实现其净零排放目标和2047年成为发达国家的愿景中发挥关键作用。
